items.question: What is BDI agent in one sentence?
items.answer: BDI agent belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning. Start after Agent and Agent S. It opens into BDI (Belief-Desire-Intention) Agent and Belief-Desire-Intention (BDI) Agent.

items.question: What should I know before studying BDI agent?
items.answer: Start with Agent and Agent S.

items.question: What should I compare BDI agent with?
items.answer: Compare it with Belief-Desire-Intention (BDI) Agent and BDI (Belief-Desire-Intention) Agent before moving on to BDI (Belief-Desire-Intention) Agent and Belief-Desire-Intention (BDI) Agent.
